import io
import string

fn render(_ d: Int, _ count: Int) -> Unit
  mut hashes = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    hashes = "#{hashes}#"
    j = j + 1
  end
  print("#{d}: #{hashes}")
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut c0 = 0
mut c1 = 0
mut c2 = 0
mut c3 = 0
mut c4 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut c6 = 0
mut c7 = 0
mut c8 = 0
mut c9 = 0

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
  if b == 48
    c0 = c0 + 1
  end
  if b == 49
    c1 = c1 + 1
  end
  if b == 50
    c2 = c2 + 1
  end
  if b == 51
    c3 = c3 + 1
  end
  if b == 52
    c4 = c4 + 1
  end
  if b == 53
    c5 = c5 + 1
  end
  if b == 54
    c6 = c6 + 1
  end
  if b == 55
    c7 = c7 + 1
  end
  if b == 56
    c8 = c8 + 1
  end
  if b == 57
    c9 = c9 + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

render(0, c0)
render(1, c1)
render(2, c2)
render(3, c3)
render(4, c4)
render(5, c5)
render(6, c6)
render(7, c7)
render(8, c8)
render(9, c9)
